ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product or service */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Unit cost of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode for the product */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty details for the product */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales offer */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the proposal the offer is linked to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the offer is for */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the offer */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Unit cost of the product in the offer */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the offer (quantity * unit_cost - discount) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the offer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the offer was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., draft, submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_offers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_offers_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the proposal is for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the proposal (e.g., draft, submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the proposal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the proposal was last updated */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the proposal */,
  "proposal_date" TEXT /* Date the proposal was sent to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer was last updated */,
  "credit_limit" TEXT /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales_rep, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offer_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales offer the log entry is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to perform the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offer_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offer_logs_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES sales_offers ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposal_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the proposal the log entry is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to perform the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposal_logs_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposal_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
